name: Banana Gratin
recipeIngredient: Vanilla yogurt or whipped cream for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rack in center of oven; heat oven to 400°F.
Grease 6, 12-ounce capacity souffle dishes or small baking dishes (large custard cups).
Set on a baking sheet.
2. Divide bananas between the dishes, overlapping them evenly and attractively.
Lightly brush tops with melted butter.
(Can be prepared up to 2 hours ahead at this point and kept at room temperature.)
3. Before cooking, evenly press confectioners' sugar through a fine wire mesh strainer
over each dish using about 1 tablespoon per serving.
4. Bake until bananas are very warm, about 8 minutes.
5. Turn oven to broil and move the baking sheet within 8 inches of the heat source.
Broil until the surface lightly browns, about 2 more minutes.
6. Serve with a small scoop of ice cream or frozen yogurt or a dollop of whipped cream.
Serve immediately.
